## Delivery issue

Closes #

## Scope and outcome

Describe the accepted project outcome delivered by this pull request.

## Validation

- [ ] The linked issue contains task-specific acceptance criteria.
- [ ] All acceptance criteria are satisfied or exceptions are documented.
- [ ] Evidence is linked in the issue or this pull request.
- [ ] Planned and actual hours are recorded.
- [ ] Relevant content, factual, language, media, accessibility and platform checks passed.
- [ ] Copyright, privacy, trademark, licensing and Udemy policy impacts were assessed.
- [ ] No credentials, learner personal data, private media or confidential source material were committed.
- [ ] The Course-Development-Team has been requested for review.

## Schedule, risk and ROI impact

State milestone impact, new dependencies, residual risks, additional effort, direct cost and expected commercial benefit. Write `None` only after checking each category.

## Test and evidence links

List workflow runs, screenshots, review records, exported assets, platform evidence or other proof.

- [ ] Approve
- [ ] Request changes
- [ ] Accept documented residual risk
